name: Shielva Gmail Connector
description: Connects to a Google account to read recent Gmail messages and send email on the user's behalf via the Gmail API.

install_fields.label: Google Client ID
install_fields.help: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Google Cloud project (APIs & Services → Credentials).

install_fields.label: Google Client Secret
install_fields.help: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret. Stored AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest — never persisted in plaintext.

install_fields.label: Scopes
install_fields.help: Gmail OAuth scopes. Defaults to read-only + send.

suggestions.label: Send
suggestions.description: Send emails on behalf of the user

install_fields.label: Sync Filter Query
install_fields.help: Optional Gmail search query to scope which messages sync() reads (e.g. 'in:inbox newer_than:7d').

install_fields.label: Max Messages per Sync
install_fields.help: How many recent messages each sync run reads (default 10).

apis.name: sync
apis.description: List recent Gmail messages, fetch and normalize each, and ingest them into the knowledge base.

apis.name: send_email
apis.description: Send an email on behalf of the authenticated Gmail user.

fields.label: Google Client ID
fields.help: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Google Cloud project.

fields.label: Google Client Secret
fields.help: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret. Stored encrypted at rest.
